metadata.title: About
metadata.description: Discover the universe of Marcos Suarez, an artist specializing in papier-mâché sculpture, where material, light, and contemporary creation meet.

hero.title: Discover the Art of Marcos Suarez
hero.description: A universe where recycled material, sculpture, and light engage in dialogue within a handcrafted and contemporary aesthetic.
hero.imageAlt: Marcos Suarez in his artistic universe

approach.title: From matter to expression
paragraphs: Marcos Suarez, originally from Havana, develops an artistic practice centered on papier-mâché sculpture, the transformation of material, and the creation of objects with a strong visual presence.

His journey began at a very young age through handmade creations in cardboard and paper, sold in Cuba’s tourist markets. This early sensitivity to handcrafted objects gradually evolved into a more sculptural, more contemporary, and more personal artistic pursuit.

Today, each work explores the dialogue between organic forms, textures, recycling, and light. Whether it is a wall sculpture, a lamp, or a functional object, each piece is conceived as a meeting point between poetry, material, and emotion.
approach.imageAlt: Functional papier-mâché sculpture by Marcos Suarez

values.title: A practice between art, material, and emotion
values.description: Each creation is born from careful attention to form, texture, and the atmosphere a piece can bring into a space.

items.title: Contemporary craftsmanship
items.text: Each piece is conceived as a singular sculptural presence, between manual gesture, form research, and contemporary sensitivity.

items.title: Transformed materials
items.text: Papier-mâché and recycled materials become works full of character, poetic, textured, and enduring.

items.title: Custom creations
items.text: Some pieces are born from a dialogue with the client to imagine a sculpture, a lamp, or a sculptural object adapted to a place.

interiors.title: My sculptures in real interiors
interiors.description1: Discover how some pieces find their place in real living spaces. Each creation interacts with its environment and becomes a singular presence in the home.
interiors.description2: Wall sculptures, sculptural lamps, or functional objects: each work integrates uniquely into the world of those who choose it.

images.livingRoomAlt: A Marcos Suarez sculpture integrated into a living room
images.wallAlt: A sculptural lamp by Marcos Suarez in an interior
images.contemporaryAlt: A Marcos Suarez work integrated into a contemporary interior
images.quote: Each piece transforms space and creates an artistic presence in everyday life.

hero.title: A work created especially for you
hero.description: Each custom creation is born from a dialogue between material, intuition, and intention. The goal is to design a singular piece in harmony with your interior, your sensibility, and your project.

steps.title: Share your idea
steps.description: Describe your wish, your space, your inspirations, or the emotion you would like to bring to life.

steps.title: Define the artistic direction
steps.description: We discuss the forms, materials, dimensions, and the aesthetic intention of the piece.

steps.title: Bring the work to life
steps.description: The sculpture is handcrafted through a sensitive, artisanal, and contemporary approach.

approach.title: An artisanal, poetic, and contemporary process
approach.description: Each project is approached as a search for form, presence, and emotion. Recycled material becomes language, the hand sets the rhythm, and the final piece finds its place between sculpture, object, and memory.

values: A unique piece designed for your world
Recycled materials and a responsible approach

contact.title: Let’s talk about your future creation
contact.description: Describe your idea, your space, or simply your intention. Every project is a collaboration.
